description: Style NoteThe perfect blend of beauty and style, this handmade necklace from adrika adds a touch of glamour to your wardrobe. Pair it with any outfit for a chic and bold look.Product DetailsSeven strand neck-piece with white beads, knot detail in front, string of beads wrapped at back for stiffnessMaterial and CareGlass and poth (glass) beads Wipe with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirtSizeLength of necklace: 88 cm
